description: Immutable audit trail of all updates to issues. Each row represents one update event. Append-only by convention.

columns.name: Title
columns.description: Set to ParentItemID for linking. Enables default SharePoint views to show the parent issue.

columns.name: ParentItemID
columns.description: Links to OFR_Issues.ItemID. Used to filter history for a specific issue.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.description: When the update was recorded. Set to Now() in Power Apps or utcNow() in Power Automate.

columns.name: StatusAtUpdate
columns.description: Captures the issue status at the time of the update (snapshot).

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free text commentary describing the update.

columns.name: UpdatedBy
columns.description: Display name of the person who added the update.
